_comment: Structured catalog of the hidden fine-tune datasets (source notes live in
finetune_datasets.txt). Each entry describes one on-server dataset folder.
On the server these folders live under
Descriptions are auto-written placeholders — Kevin may rewrite them.
To turn an entry into a usable challenge, add it to hidden_challenges.json.

datasets.name: zain_hall_cw+ccw
datasets.description: Hallway driving in both directions (clockwise and counterclockwise) with no cones — general loop-following on a clear course.

datasets.name: zain^zain_ccw_cones^zain_vit_hall_cw_ccw_t5_last^9^1782162153691
datasets.description: Hallway driving counterclockwise through a cone course — navigating cones in the reverse direction.

datasets.name: zain^zain-cw-cones^agent_zain_vitclip_hallt6_last^9^1781903251095
datasets.description: Hallway driving clockwise through a cone course — navigating cones in the forward direction.

datasets.name: zain^zain-hall-cones-cw+ccw^9^1781642085692
datasets.description: Hallway driving in both directions through a cone course — combined clockwise and counterclockwise cone navigation.

datasets.name: zain^hall_justcones^9^1781801014612
datasets.description: Hallway driving focused on cone navigation — cones present, direction not encoded in the name.
